name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: California Check Cashing Stores at 8451 Elk Grove Blvd Suite 9, Elk Grove, CA 95758 is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 464 reviews. Call +1 916-691-2520.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores is operated by California Check Cashing, LLC, a multi-location financial services retailer with multiple branches in San Francisco and across California. The company positions itself as a neighborhood-based money services provider, with at least three locations in San Francisco alone—at 2531 Mission St, 1098 Market St, and 5129 Mission St. The business has been operating long enough to build a recognizable regional brand in the check cashing and short-term lending space.

The company's core offerings center on check cashing and short-term financial services. Payroll advances are available up to $250, accessible both in-store and online. Beyond lending, the store functions as a full-service money center: customers can pay bills, send or receive Western Union money transfers, purchase money orders, pick up Green Dot Visa® debit cards, and get tax preparation assistance. The loan application process requires a Social Security number, government-issued photo ID, proof of income, and a checking account with routing number.

What distinguishes California Check Cashing Stores from bare-bones check cashers is the breadth of services consolidated under one roof. The Western Union partnership allows customers to send international wire transfers at the same counter where they cash checks or pay bills. Tax preparation is an unusual addition for a check cashing chain and serves customers who may not use a traditional CPA. The company also provides reloadable prepaid debit cards, offering a banking-adjacent tool for the unbanked. Weekday hours run 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM, with Saturday availability until 4:00 PM.

Honestly, California Check Cashing Stores serves a specific and underserved niche—people without bank accounts or those who need immediate cash access outside of traditional banking hours or eligibility. That said, the payroll advance cap of $250 is low, and the company's own consumer notice explicitly warns that 'small-dollar loans used over a long period of time can be expensive.' Payday-style products carry high effective APRs, and borrowers who roll over advances will pay significantly more than the principal. This is a useful last-resort resource, not a substitute for lower-cost credit.
address: 8451 Elk Grove Blvd Suite 9, Elk Grove, CA 95758

company_info.headquarters: 8451 Elk Grove Blvd Suite 9, Elk Grove, CA 95758

pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (Mission St, Market St, 5129 Mission St) for convenient access
Payroll advances available both in-store and online, up to $250
Western Union money transfers and money orders available on-site
Tax preparation services offered alongside standard financial services
Green Dot Visa® debit cards available for unbanked customers
Weekday hours extend to 7:00 PM, accommodating working customers
Bill pay and reloadable debit cards consolidate multiple errands into one stop
cons: Payroll advance cap is only $250—insufficient for larger financial emergencies
Payday loan products carry high costs; company's own disclaimer warns against long-term use
Closed on Sundays, limiting access for customers with weekend-only schedules
No advertised maximum loan amounts beyond $250 payroll advance; larger personal loans not offered
Loan eligibility requires an open checking account, excluding the fully unbanked from loan products
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need to cash checks without a bank account
Customers needing small, fast payroll advances up to $250 with same-day availability
People needing Western Union wire transfers or money orders without a bank visit
Low-income earners who need bill pay, tax prep, and check cashing in one location
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for unbanked or cash-dependent consumers in the San Francisco area who need immediate check cashing, small advances, or Western Union transfers without a bank account. The main caveat is cost: payday-style loans are expensive by design, and the $250 advance ceiling makes this unsuitable for anyone facing a significant financial shortfall.
services: Payroll Advances (up to $250, in-store and online)
